'''gapuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hdbk|hdbk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hdbk|hdbk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gapuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæpivith|gæpivith]] || [[word:gæpivij|gæpivij]] || [[word:gæpivish|gæpivish]] || [[word:gæpivi|gæpivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gapupuvuth|gapupuvuth]] || [[word:gapupuvuj|gapupuvuj]] || [[word:gapupuvush|gapupuvush]] || [[word:gapupuvu|gapupuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gapuvuth|gapuvuth]] || [[word:gapuvuj|gapuvuj]] || [[word:gapuvush|gapuvush]] || [[word:gapuvu|gapuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gapufvuth|gapufvuth]] || [[word:gapufvuj|gapufvuj]] || [[word:gapufvush|gapufvush]] || [[word:gapufvuf|gapufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gapuvuthu|gapuvuthu]] || [[word:gapuvuju|gapuvuju]] || [[word:gapuvushu|gapuvushu]] || [[word:gapuvuku|gapuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gapuvuth|gapuvuth]] || [[word:gapuvuj|gapuvuj]] || [[word:gapuvush|gapuvush]] || [[word:gapuvu|gapuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gapuvuthul|gapuvuthul]] || [[word:gapuvujul|gapuvujul]] || [[word:gapuvushul|gapuvushul]] || [[word:gapuvukul|gapuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gapuvuthuthu|gapuvuthuthu]] || [[word:gapuvujuju|gapuvujuju]] || [[word:gapuvushushu|gapuvushushu]] || [[word:gapuvuku|gapuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gapuvuthun|gapuvuthun]] || [[word:gapuvujun|gapuvujun]] || [[word:gapuvushun|gapuvushun]] || [[word:gapuvukun|gapuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gapuvuthuoro|gapuvuthuoro]] || [[word:gapuvujuoro|gapuvujuoro]] || [[word:gapuvushuoro|gapuvushuoro]] || [[word:gapuvukuoro|gapuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
